verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Stand up, stand up for Jesus, ye soldiers of the cross, Lift high His royal banner, it must not suffer loss. From victory unto victory, His army shall He lead, Till every foe is vanquished and Christ is Lord indeed.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Stand up, stand up for Jesus, the trumpet call obey; Forth to the mighty conflict, in this His glorious day. Ye that are men now serve Him, against unnumbered foes; Let courage rise with danger, and strength to strength oppose.

verse.name: v3
